title: B64 6PL, MTB (Midlands) Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/EP3136MN/V007
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit notice and decision document for:   Operator name: MTB (Midlands) Limited Installation name: MTB (Midlands) Permit number: EPR/EP3136MN/V007  "
